专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly popular in society; in 2025, the number of science candidates in this province is about 52,538, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (including uncertain marks), with an estimated science candidate count of about 163,000 based on historical proportions, a surge of about 211% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, in the southwestern region, geographically distant from Xinjiang; the university's enrollment proportion in this province is about 1.5%-2%, not a major source of students, so regional preference has limited impact.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Sichuan University conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region. In 2023, the lowest ranking was 6495 (planned 39 students). In 2024, after expansion to 51 students, the ranking dropped significantly to 7433. In 2025, the plan increased to 66 students but the ranking rebounded to 6499. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is reduced to 54 students (a decrease of 12 students from 2025, a reduction of approximately 18.2%). The reduction in plan exerts upward pressure on rankings (ranking number decreases, competition relatively eases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and a Class A university of the national Double First-Class initiative. The university has strong medical disciplines, with the West China Medical Center, enjoying high reputation in fields such as stomatology and clinical medicine, and has sustained appeal to Xinjiang candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to be highly popular nationwide. The West China Medical brand of Sichuan University is prominent, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine (eight-year/five-year program) and Stomatology being highly competitive. The scale of medical enrollment in Xinjiang province is limited, and high-quality medical education resources are scarce, leading to strong willingness among candidates to apply for medical programs at Sichuan University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the lowest admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Xinjiang in 2026 will be approximately 5820, an increase compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, admission difficulty slightly decreases), with a fluctuation range expected between 5645 and 5995.
